listing_name: A well-deserved rest in Laguna del Mar, La Serena
description:
Cozy apartment located on the 1st line facing the ocean, on the 2nd floor, in La Serena, close to Mall, Supermarket, Regional Library, Universities, El Faro and Downtown. The complex has a navigable lagoon and 5 swimming pools, tennis courts, volleyball, five-a-side football, calisthenics sports area, jogging circuit and event room.
2 Bedroom Suite: 2 double beds and 1 bunk bed, cable TV and prepaid wifi.

The space
You can relax in your lounge chair, sunbathing on the sand while your children play in the pool or in the sand thanks to the safety of being on a beach for exclusive use. The apartment is very safe for families with small children. The apartment has suite bedrooms, one with a double bed and the other with a double bed and a cabin (bunk bed), which allows maximum comfort.
All this with a beautiful balcony where you can relax while enjoying the ocean view.

Important:

Kayaks will now have a $4000 charge for 30 min use.

Guest access
The complex has extensive recreational areas for free use, including: tennis court, volleyball court, gym area (calisthenics), 5 swimming pools and navigable lagoon, kayak available for rent, barbecue area and event room.

Other things to note
-The apartment does not have a washing machine but inside the same building there is a laundry (level -1) where you can wash for $2000 (it takes 30 minutes to wash) and dry for another $2000 (it takes 1 hour to dry)
-Access to the complex is very controlled to protect the safety of the residents, who are generally families with children.

listing_name: Beautiful View on the 1st Line [Remodeled]
description:
Wake up to the sound of the waves and enjoy endless sunsets from the terrace with panoramic views of the Pacific Ocean. Our apartment, located on Avenida del Mar, is the perfect place for couples or families looking for relaxation, comfort, and a beachfront experience. With a spacious terrace with a grill, a pool, private parking, and direct beach access, this space is designed for you to unwind and enjoy.

The space
Master bedroom: double bed, view, and natural light

Second bedroom: queen-size bed, ideal for children or guests

Large terrace with grill, lounge chairs, and a table to enjoy the direct, unobstructed ocean view

Living room: large sofa bed, comfortable for 2 people

Fully equipped kitchen for cooking whatever you want

One full bathroom

Guest access
The entrance to the building (pedestrian and car) is on Avenida Los Nísperos.

The apartment has a separate entrance, so you can arrive at any time.

The building has a laundry room (paid), a pool, and private parking. The elevator has been working smoothly since mid-2025, when it was finally repaired.

The building's location is unparalleled; the beachfront area is one of the quietest in La Serena and is just a few meters from several cafes, bars, and restaurants.

It is recommended to do your grocery shopping online (within the Jumbo and Lider delivery areas) to avoid the traffic heading downtown.

listing_name: Oceanfront · Fast Wi-Fi · Ideal for long stays
description:
Looking for a place to telework from the beach, or just to recharge by the sea? Imagine starting your day jogging on the beach, or taking a refreshing swim at the end of the day. Whether you want to rest and relax, or telework with high-speed Wi-Fi, surrounded by the natural beauty of the sea, this apartment is the ideal place for you. Book your stay today and don't miss out on a unique experience in paradise. We're waiting for you!

The space
What makes this apartment special is the combination of indoor and outdoor. Inside, you will find a new and modern place with a terrace overlooking the ocean ideal for wonderful breakfasts and dinners.

The apartment has 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms (1 en suite), 1 kitchenette, a living room, and a terrace.
The kitchen is fully equipped so you can prepare the most delicious homemade meals. The living room has a smartTV so you can connect your favorite series; there is also a washing machine so you can wash your clothes without spending money on laundries. The Wi-Fi is high speed.
If you want, I can leave you additional sheets and towels to those already available.
To store your things, we have large closets (wardrobes) inside the apartment. If you still need more space, we have a warehouse available.
Outside you will find a building with 24-hour controlled access; ample parking (our parking lot has no roof limitations, so you can easily enter with your 4 x 4 with trunk); guards who watch over security at all times.

You'll also find a small indoor park for strolls with your children or pet, or simply to go down and read a book in the evening. There are two swimming pools, one for adults and another one for children. There are also children's games.
On the roof you will find tables and chairs to go up for tea (or mate), overlooking the beautiful bay of La Serena, or if you prefer, you can prepare a delicious barbecue in the barbecue located in that area.

And best of all, the beach is just a minute's walk away. In addition, the street where the building is located is quiet, so you can enjoy a good night's sleep without disturbing noises.
Now, if you want to party, a few minutes walk away you will find the best pubs and restaurants in the city.

Need to telework? Imagine waking up to the sound of waves and the smell of the sea, having a coffee on your terrace overlooking the sea while working efficiently thanks to our high-speed internet connection. Enjoy lunch on the beach, a refreshing swim in the sea to recharge your batteries, and return to work in a relaxed and quiet environment.

Do you want to check in early or check out late? Don't worry, we can talk about your needs, so you have a superior experience.

Guest access
Free and unlimited use:
- High speed WiFi
- Preferential indoor parking (next to the door) and guarded.
- A swimming pool for adults.
- A children's pool.
- Children's games.
- Indoor park.
- A panoramic terrace.
- A barbecue with a panoramic view of the bay.
- Bicycle parking.
- Bed linen available if needed.
- Additional sets of towels if needed.
- Hair dryer; electric grill; microwave; washing machine; coffee maker.

listing_name: Reservaya.laserena/Casa Family Pool, Movie Theater and More
description:
Enjoy a unique family vacation on our exclusive property! Relax in a private pool, family hot tub, movie theater, playground area, and more. Ideal for small and large family groups, with 5 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, equipped kitchen, grill and an additional Tiny House cabin. All designed for privacy, comfort and unforgettable moments. Always attentive to your questions and services. * Bedrooms and spaces are set up according to the number of guests. We look forward to seeing you!

The space
“Escape to an unforgettable family vacation on our exclusive property! Designed to offer total privacy and all the necessary amenities, our home is great for groups of 4 to 15. We provide you with a space where you can relax, disconnect from stress and enjoy unforgettable moments with family, surrounded by nature and tranquility.

Family sharing spaces are adapted according to the needs of families. For example, for just one couple, 1 bedroom is enabled, and so for larger families, more spaces are enabled. We have all the necessary amenities for you to spend a few excellent family days with memories of family connection.
*** Remember that only registered guests can enter, not unregistered people or visitors.

Featured amenities:

Large private pool with separate areas for children and adults, where you can enjoy privacy without strangers.
Family hot tub with whirlpool (check for extra cost), perfect for relaxing in the evenings and nights, providing a unique wellness experience.
Quartz Bed: A unique experience for physical and emotional well-being. The bed is equipped with quartz stones, known for its healing and negative energy release properties. Ideal for those looking for a space for deep relaxation and revitalization.
Private movie room equipped with armchairs, surround sound and the best streaming platforms to enjoy movies and series as a family.
Family play area that includes taca-taca, cama saltarina, among others, ensuring fun for all ages.
Additional Tiny House cabin, next to the main house, for added flexibility and comfort. Between both, we offer 5 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms, fully equipped kitchen and grill for roasts. *** It is enabled when the family that books is greater than 10 guests.
Strategic location: Be careful! Although we are not next to the beach, our location towards the interior of La Serena, we are in a residential sector, offers immediate access to Avenida Islón, quickly connecting you with the Elqui Valley, the center of La Serena (4 km away) and the beaches (7 km away). In addition, we are only 16 km from Las Curuninas water park, ideal for a day of family fun.

We know some are looking to be closer to the beach (we are 8 km from the lighthouse), but we have worked hard for years to offer a home that exceeds our guests' expectations, with a combination of privacy, exclusivity, and attention to detail that is hard to find elsewhere. We can't move to the beach side or Avenida del Mar, but we guarantee that our competitive rates and our high quality facilities more than offset the distance. If we were on the beach, our prices would be 4 times higher!

Privacy and exclusivity: Only families who book with us will have exclusive access to all our facilities. No space is shared with other families, ensuring peace of mind and a fully personalized experience. We pride ourselves in making our guests happy and grateful families who value a unique space to create unforgettable memories. The photos and videos of your moments here will be treasures you will remember forever.

Clear rules for a safe stay: Only registered Airbnb guests and our system can enter the property. The spaces and bedrooms are enabled according to the amount of people informed at the time of booking. If the entry of unregistered people is detected, the stay will unfortunately end immediately without refund, as we prioritize the safety, trust, honesty, and mutual respect between us and all our guests.

Spacious and safe spaces: The house has a living 120 square meters, as well as a large patio with a grill, perfect for family roasts. The parking can accommodate up to 4 vehicles. For added security, the property is equipped with a front security camera system and an electronic access gate, offering peace of mind throughout your stay.

Connectivity: Despite the experience of external disconnection, priority of family moments, and tranquility that we offer, we know how important it is to stay connected when you need it. That's why the property has high speed WiFi (200 Mb/s of descent and rise), ideal for all devices.

In short: Our property is not only a place to spend the holidays, it is a family retreat designed for those who seek privacy, comfort, and exclusivity. We are among the few accommodations in the region that allow you to enjoy such a complete and exclusive family experience. We constantly strive to remain in continuous improvement of our facilities and services to offer the best to our guests. You can see our guests' reviews, we look forward to seeing you with welcome gifts, special discounts on tourist experiences, pirate boat, among others.

If you are looking for the perfect place to disconnect from the world and reconnect with your family, this is the ideal destination for you. Book now and live the experience your family deserves in a safe, comfortable and private environment!”

Guest access
The big house offers an ideal space for families with 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, including an en-suite bathroom for added comfort. In addition, it has an additional bathroom in the pool and hot tub area, ensuring that all family members have convenient access.

The Tiny House Cabin provides 2 bedrooms and a bathroom, offering perfect additional accommodation for larger groups or families looking for more privacy.

The property stands out for its spacious and fully-equipped kitchen, ideal for preparing family meals, and a barbecue area to enjoy outdoor barbecues. The house is carefully laid out to maximize comfort and use of space.

Located in a quiet family neighborhood, the property is just 30 meters from a mini-market, making it easy to access what you need during your stay. It is the first house in the neighborhood, which gives you immediate access to Avenida Islón, with excellent connections to:

Valle del Elqui (approx. 55 km)
Las Curuninas Water Park (16 km)
Highway 5 Norte (3 km)
Beach (8 km)
Centro de La Serena (4 km)

Other things to note
Important Details to Highlight:

Tempered Tub: It is 100% electrically operated, so its use requires an extra payment to contribute to high electrical costs. The maximum use is 4 continuous hours per day.
The hot tub has recommendations for care, so that it can be used in an excellent way.

Note: Large house and tiny house cabin: The 🏡 large house is enabled alone [ without the tiny house cabin ] for families of less than 12 guests. The 🏡 large house + the tiny house cabin [Both together] are enabled for families of more than 12 guests. There are cases where small families [fewer than 12 guests] request to add a tiny house cabin. Only in those cases would there be an additional cost.

Guests: Only guests registered on Airbnb and in our registry can enter the property. Visitors or unregistered persons are not allowed on the property. If that happens, the reservation is canceled without a refund.

Beds and Distribution:

Master Bedroom in the Big House: Enjoy a king-size bed and en-suite bathroom, offering exceptional luxury and comfort.
Bedrooms 2 and 3 in the Casa Grande: Equipped with full beds and a bunk bed, ideal for accommodating children and adults.
Master Bedroom in the Tiny House: With a full bed, perfect for an intimate and comfortable experience.
Additional Bedroom in the Tiny House: Features a full bed, providing flexibility and comfort.
Common Spaces: Includes a futon in the living room for extra guests or family relaxation moments.
Flexible Configuration:

Spaces and bedrooms are enabled or blocked based on the number of registered guests, ensuring a personalized stay tailored to your needs.

Additional Extras: We have strategic alliances in the region that allow special discounts on family experiences for our guests.

Personalized Information: We offer full assistance with detailed arrival instructions, maps, and all the information needed for a smooth arrival and stay.
Customer Service: I'm available to answer any questions quickly and ensure your experience is exceptional

listing_name: Comfortable and quiet room near Av. del Mar
description:
Comfortable and cozy private room, located just half a block from Av. del Mar, restaurants, and transportation (on Ruta 5) to the mall, bus terminal, or downtown La Serena, in a quiet and safe residential area. Ideal for people looking for rest, order, and a respectful environment.

Young married couple, both workers, rent a room located at a few steps from the beach and public transport that will take you to the bus terminal, downtown, mall, supermarkets and Elqui Valley.

The space
Our place has excellent reviews, highlighting the cleanliness, the location close to the beach, and the peaceful atmosphere.

Ideal for solo travelers, business travelers, students, or anyone looking for a safe and quiet place to relax.

Prime location just steps from Av. del Mar, public transportation, restaurants, convenience stores, and walking areas.

It has access to a swimming pool during the open seasons and has an elevator.

Guest access
The guest has access to a shared bathroom with the hosts (shampoo, conditioner, soap, toilet paper, towel if needed), the kitchen, kitchen utensils, and the home's common areas, always respecting the shared spaces. The building has a concierge, security, and a swimming pool, ensuring a comfortable and safe stay.

During your stay
The accommodation is a room inside our home, shared with the hosts (a married couple). We take care to maintain a clean, quiet, and organized environment, making this space ideal for responsible guests who value good coexistence. We are always available for any calls or questions via message.

Other things to note
Due to our business hours, check-in is between 5:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m., and check-out is by 8:00 a.m. These schedules allow us to maintain order and tranquility for everyone.

⚠️ Important:
It is not an entire apartment; it is a room within the home for a single person, so respect for the basic rules of coexistence and schedules is expected.

listing_name: Daily house rental in La Serena, Colina el Pino
description:
Hello! My house is located near the airport, the Jumbo Supermarket and the access to the Elqui Valley route. 55 m, 2 bedrooms, kitchen, living room, 1 bathroom. WiFi. Smart TV. The house is rented complete, it is not located near the coast, but here you will find silence and tranquility day and night. NO SMOKING, NO PETS. 1 additional guest is allowed for an extra amount per night (a futon is provided)

The space
My place is super quiet, ideal for relaxing, and is located near the second bus stop to the Elqui Valley.

Guest access
Parking is for one vehicle only. It is parked in the front yard, but protected by the gate. There is a very complete warehouse two minutes from the house, on foot, going east and then turning left on Ulriksen Street. The Jumbo Ulriksen supermarket is a 10-minute walk away. In the neighborhood there are several squares with games, sports machines and a multi-court. There is public transportation 15 steps from the house, which runs along the main avenue, mostly buses, but there is also a minibus. They all go downtown (they don't pass by all the time, you have to have a little patience, but they do pass by). There is no direct public transportation to the beach, bus terminal, or airport.

Other things to note
I've been overwhelmed by the ban on smoking, and it saddens me greatly because smokers ALWAYS leave evidence everywhere, starting with the stench. Even if they smoked outside, the smell permeates everywhere. BE CONSCIOUS and respectful. I can't control or check your luggage. And no matter how much air freshener you use, there's no potion that eliminates the stench of cigarettes. So I insist, smokers are not welcome.
